title: Prompt Router — Stop Sending Every Prompt to Your Most Expensive Model
tagline: Paste a day's worth of prompts and watch each one get routed to the cheapest model tier that can actually handle it — an embedding + feature classifier running 100% in your browser, with a live savings ledger.
description: In-browser LLM router: classifies each prompt and sends it to the cheapest capable model tier, with a live cost-savings ledger. Day 8 of kb-daily-builds.
